tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
payload.description: MTA Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan detailing recurring and specific agenda items for 2024-2025 committee meetings.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: MTA Board committee overseeing Long Island Rail Road operations, with recurring and specific agenda items for 2024-2025.
MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide Mid-Year update on Railroad Operations.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2024 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide comprehensive report on the Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.

tool_args.label: November Timetable Change & Fall Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2025.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

tool_args.label: March Timetable Change & Spring Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices.
Materials presented to the Committee for review pertaining to certain agency initiatives and functions.
A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

payload.description: The Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan covers LIRR-specific agenda items.
